title: A Week around Lake Geneva: History, Nature & Cuisine (Revised)

checkpoints.title: Explore the Olympic Museum
checkpoints.description: Dive into the world of sports at this interactive museum. It's a perfect indoor activity for a rainy day, filled with Olympic artifacts and games. The museum park also offers sculptures and a beautiful view of the lake.

checkpoints.title: Lunch in the Flon District
checkpoints.description: Head to the trendy Flon district, known for its vibrant atmosphere, shops, and diverse range of restaurants, making it easy to find a place that suits your mood.

checkpoints.title: Discover Plateforme 10
checkpoints.description: Visit this cluster of art museums (MCBA, mudac, Photo Élysée) right next to the train station. It's a world-class cultural district perfect for staying dry.

checkpoints.title: Stroll through the Old Town
checkpoints.description: Explore the cobblestone streets of the Old Town. Use the famous covered stairways, like Escaliers du Marché, to stay sheltered while moving between places like Place de la Palud and the Cathedral.

checkpoints.title: Dinner in the Old Town
checkpoints.description: Enjoy a cozy dinner in the historic atmosphere. For Asian food, the Pâquis district in Geneva is known for its authentic and affordable eateries from around the world.

checkpoints.title: Ouchy Lakeside Promenade
checkpoints.description: Meet your friend for a walk along the beautiful tree-lined promenade in Ouchy. Enjoy the views of Lake Geneva and the Alps.

checkpoints.title: Optional: Coffee with a View
checkpoints.description: Find a café with a terrace along the lake in Ouchy to enjoy a drink with a view if the weather is pleasant.

checkpoints.title: Drive to Lavaux Vineyards
checkpoints.description: A short 20-minute drive to the UNESCO World Heritage Lavaux vineyards. These stunning terraced vineyards offer breathtaking views of the lake.

checkpoints.title: Vineyard Walk
checkpoints.description: Take a walk through the picturesque villages and vine-covered hillsides. The scenery is unforgettable and perfect for a morning stroll.

checkpoints.title: Wine Tasting at a Local Cellar
checkpoints.description: Drop into one of the many local cellars for a tasting of local wines like Chasselas.

checkpoints.title: Explore the Old Town & St. Pierre Cathedral
checkpoints.description: Discover the heart of historic Geneva. Walk through the cobblestone streets and visit St. Peter's Cathedral for panoramic city views from the tower.

checkpoints.title: See the Jet d'Eau and Walk to the UN
checkpoints.description: Stroll down to the lake to see Geneva's iconic water fountain. Then, walk along the Quai du Mont-Blanc towards the United Nations office, seeing the Broken Chair sculpture.

checkpoints.title: Visit the Patek Philippe Museum
checkpoints.description: Explore the exquisite world of watchmaking at this renowned museum. It showcases centuries of horological history and craftsmanship.

checkpoints.title: Drive to Yvoire, France
checkpoints.description: Take a scenic drive (about 1 hour) to this stunningly preserved medieval village on the southern shore of Lake Geneva.

checkpoints.title: Explore the Village
checkpoints.description: Wander the flower-decked cobblestone streets, explore the charming shops, and admire the historic stone houses.

checkpoints.title: Visit the Garden of Five Senses
checkpoints.description: A beautiful and thematic garden to explore within the village walls (check opening status for October).

days.day: Friday, 10.10.2025 - Castle and a Fancy Dinner

checkpoints.title: Drive to Chillon Castle & Montreux
checkpoints.description: Drive east along the lake (about 40 mins) to visit the magnificent Chillon Castle, a medieval fortress built right on the water's edge.

checkpoints.title: Tour Chillon Castle
checkpoints.description: Explore Switzerland's most visited historic monument, with its underground vaults, great halls, and beautiful courtyards.

checkpoints.title: Stroll the Montreux Promenade
checkpoints.description: Walk along the famous flower-lined lakeside promenade from the castle into Montreux. See the statue of Freddie Mercury.

checkpoints.title: Fancy Dinner in Montreux
checkpoints.description: Enjoy a special dinner at a fine dining restaurant in Montreux. For a memorable experience, look for a restaurant with a terrace overlooking the lake. I recommend using Google Maps or a platform like TheFork to filter for highly-rated fine dining options and check recent reviews.

days.day: Saturday, 11.10.2025 - Memorable Alpine Hike: Rochers de Naye

checkpoints.title: Drive to Montreux & Ascend Rochers de Naye
checkpoints.description: Drive to Montreux (about 40 mins). From there, take the cogwheel railway up to Rochers de Naye. This offers a spectacular and effortless ascent into the high Alps, with stunning views all the way.

checkpoints.title: Hike at Rochers de Naye
checkpoints.description: At the top, you can enjoy short hikes with breathtaking panoramic views of Lake Geneva and the surrounding Alps. Visit the Marmots' Paradise or simply soak in the incredible scenery from over 2000 meters altitude.

checkpoints.title: Lunch at the Summit
checkpoints.description: Have lunch at the restaurant at the summit, enjoying a meal with a truly unforgettable view.

checkpoints.title: Return Journey & Descent
checkpoints.description: Take the cogwheel railway back down to Montreux. You can choose to explore Montreux a bit more if you have time before driving back.
